reforms.description: Japan is initiating the University Endowment Fund worth JPY 10 trillion in FY2021 to expand investment and R&D, aiming to support clean energy technologies and achieve net zero carbon emissions.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund is expected to enhance R&D capabilities and support the development of clean technologies, contributing to long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government announced the establishment of the fund as part of its growth strategy.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of a significant fund for R&D represents a structural change in Japan's approach to innovation and clean technology investment.
reforms.source_quote: The growth strategy includes expanding investment and R&D, especially for starting the operation of the University Endowment Fund worth JPY 10 trillion in FY2021.

reforms.description: The Japanese government adopted a new economic policy package aimed at enhancing R&D and investment in advanced technologies to promote digital transformation and green growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By investing in R&D and advanced technologies, the policy aims to boost innovation and productivity, which are essential for long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government adopted the new economic policy package in November 2021.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in R&D and advanced technologies, which is crucial for Japan's economic recovery and future growth.
reforms.source_quote: The government adopted a new economic policy package...support to enhance R&D and investment in advanced technologies, thus promoting the digital transformation and green growth.

reforms.description: The government is establishing a fund for R&Ds toward carbon neutrality, aimed at promoting research and innovation in sustainable technologies.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investing in R&D for carbon neutrality is expected to drive innovation and create new markets, contributing to long-term economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund was established as part of the economic policy package.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the R&D fund represents a significant investment in sectoral research, addressing climate change while fostering innovation.
reforms.source_quote: Establishing a fund for R&Ds toward carbon neutrality.

reforms.description: The government is enhancing financial support for SMEs, which includes measures to promote innovation and resilience in the face of economic challenges.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing financial support to SMEs, the government aims to stimulate innovation and growth in the startup ecosystem, which is crucial for economic recovery.
reforms.status_evidence: The financial support measures were included in the economic policy package.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it directly supports the resilience and innovation capacity of SMEs, which are vital for the economy.

reforms.description: The Fukushima Innovation Coast Framework promotes digitalisation and renewable energy initiatives in the region, including a major hydrogen demonstration project aimed at reducing production costs and managing power grid demand.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The project aims to enhance energy efficiency and promote the use of renewable energy, contributing to long-term economic growth and sustainability.
reforms.status_evidence: The framework has been actively promoting various initiatives since its inception.
reforms.importance_rationale: The framework represents a significant effort to integrate innovation and sustainability in a region affected by disaster, with potential long-term benefits for the local economy.
reforms.source_quote: Fukushima is the site of a major hydrogen demonstration project examining the possibilities of lowering the cost of hydrogen production as well as adjusting demand in the power grid.

reforms.description: Japan is set to introduce a feed-in premium system in 2022 to better integrate renewable energy with electricity markets, following the previous feed-in tariff system that supported rapid growth in renewable energy generation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The transition to a feed-in premium is expected to enhance market efficiency and support the growth of renewable energy, contributing to long-term sustainability and innovation in the energy sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The introduction of the feed-in premium system is planned for 2022.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant shift in Japan's renewable energy policy, aiming to enhance integration with markets and support further expansion of renewables, which is crucial for achieving climate goals.
reforms.source_quote: As a next step, a system of support through a feed-in premium will be introduced in 2022 with the aim of better integration with electricity markets and continuing support for further expansion of renewables.

reforms.description: The Japanese government has made a strong push to eliminate the use of hanko (stamps) in administrative procedures, which often serve no practical purpose and increase transaction costs. This reform aims to improve the efficiency of public service delivery by enabling more processes to be conducted online.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By streamlining administrative processes and reducing transaction costs, this reform enhances the efficiency of public services, which can lead to increased productivity and better resource allocation.
reforms.status_evidence: The central government has made a strong push to eliminate hanko and encourage more effective use of digital technologies.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant change in administrative practices that can lead to improved efficiency in public service delivery, although it does not constitute a system-wide overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The central government has also made a strong push to eliminate hanko and more generally for regulatory reforms to encourage more effective use of digital technologies.

reforms.description: The Japanese government established a new 'Digital Agency' in September 2021 to oversee digital transformation efforts across public sector organizations, aiming to improve data sharing and administrative efficiency.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The Digital Agency aims to enhance productivity in both public and private sectors through improved data governance and digital services, which can lead to cost reductions and better service delivery.
reforms.status_evidence: The Digital Agency was established with a dedicated staff and mandate.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Digital Agency represents a significant structural change in Japan's approach to digital governance, with potential long-term impacts on productivity and public service efficiency.
reforms.source_quote: To address these issues, the Japanese government established a new 'Digital Agency' in September 2021, with a staff of 600 officials, including 200 ICT engineers.

reforms.description: Fukuoka city has implemented policies to promote digitalisation and support start-ups, including creating supportive organisations like business incubators and easing regulatory procedures for new businesses.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By fostering a vibrant start-up ecosystem, the initiative enhances innovation and economic dynamism in the region.
reforms.status_evidence: The city has been at the forefront of the digital transformation in the provision of public services.
reforms.importance_rationale: The initiative represents a significant effort to enhance the start-up environment and digital services, contributing to local economic growth.
reforms.source_quote: Fukuoka is trying to create a business environment to encourage start-ups, including by attracting foreigners.

reforms.description: The government is considering reinstating tax carry-over provisions for new and young firms to enhance their ability to invest in R&D.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Reinstating tax carry-over provisions would enable new firms to invest more in R&D, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government is considering altering the structure of support to help target different objectives and groups of firms.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform aims to address specific barriers faced by new firms in accessing R&D funding, which is significant for enhancing innovation capacity.
reforms.source_quote: Reinstituting the tax carry-over for new and young firms or making the credit refundable would help them invest in their early stages.

reforms.description: The Japan Patent Office introduced the IP Business Valuation Report and the IP business proposal to assist financial institutions in understanding intellectual property issues when lending to small and medium-sized enterprises, thereby supporting the development of the market based on intangibles.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Facilitates access to financing for SMEs by enhancing the understanding of their intangible assets, which can lead to increased innovation and business growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The IP Business Valuation Report and proposal were introduced to assist financial institutions.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant step in enhancing the financial ecosystem for SMEs by addressing the challenges related to intellectual property valuation.
reforms.source_quote: The Japan Patent Office introduced the IP Business Valuation Report and the IP business proposal in 2014 to help financial institutions better understand intellectual property issues when lending to small and medium-sized enterprises.

reforms.description: The GIGA School initiative was launched to ensure that every student in compulsory education has access to a computer or tablet connected to high-speed broadband, aiming to enhance digital skills and educational outcomes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By improving access to digital tools and resources, the initiative aims to enhance the digital skills of students, which is essential for future innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: By the end of March 2021, nearly all school districts were providing one computer per student.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a structural change in the educational landscape, aiming to equip the next generation with essential digital skills for a rapidly evolving economy.
reforms.source_quote: The GIGA project aims to build an ICT environment to create a learning environment that leverages the best of new technologies and traditional approaches to pedagogy.

reforms.description: The Artificial Intelligence Strategy from 2019 supports training to increase the numbers of skilled workers in innovative industries, particularly in IT skills relevant to the digital transformation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhances the skill set of the workforce, which is essential for driving innovation and productivity in the digital economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been actively promoting training initiatives since its launch.
reforms.importance_rationale: The strategy represents a significant effort to align workforce skills with emerging technological needs, which is crucial for maintaining competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: The Artificial Intelligence Strategy from 2019 supports training to increase the numbers of skilled workers in innovative industries.
